security.csp: default-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; media-src 'self' blob: mediastream:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost http: https: ws: wss: stun: stuns:

bundle.shortDescription: Reach your home dev machine from any device
bundle.longDescription: FreeRemoteDesk is a browser-first, self-hosted remote desktop. Install this agent on the machine you want to reach; deploy the PWA + signaling to your own free-tier Cloudflare and Vercel accounts; connect from any browser at zero monthly cost.
